title: coeloglossum viride f. thuringiacum
intro: Coeloglossum viride f. thuringiacum, also known as the Thuringian green orchid, is a subspecies of the Coeloglossum viride plant, a type of orchid native to Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Coeloglossum viride f. thuringiacum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
